title: aquilegia vulgaris subsp. glandulosa
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. glandulosa, commonly known as the glandular columbine, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family Ranunculaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. glandulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin issues and minor injuries. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into tinctures, infusions, or salves, and are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
